zh.lifeSummary: 當Dionysia English於1212年出生在英國戴文時，她的父親Sir Robert English26歲，母親Lady Agathe22歲。她於1245年之前與Lord Henry I de Champernoun of Iflracombe在英國戴文布洛阿可利斯特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1284年3月在她的家鄉享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dionysia English于1212年出生在英国戴文时，她的父亲Sir Robert English26岁，母亲Lady Agathe22岁。她于1245年之前与Lord Henry I de Champernoun of Iflracombe在英国戴文布洛阿可利斯特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1284年3月在她的家乡享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: English
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Welsh: ethnic name from Middle English English, Inglish, Inglis ‘English’ (Old English Englisc), sometimes alternating with Anglo-Norman French Engleis, Engles, Anglais, Angles (Old French Englois). Compare Inglis and England . Among the aristocracy and upper gentry it marked out a man of English ancestry from one of Norman or continental origin. In counties bordering England with Scotland and Wales the name distinguished an Englishman from a Scot or a native Welshman on both sides of the border. The name may also have been acquired by English merchants who traded abroad or who lived and worked in a ‘French’ borough in England (one exclusively administered by Normans).
Irish: in Ireland, this name was used to denote an Englishman, often being adopted for Irish Aingléis ‘Englishman’ or through mistranslation for Mac an Ghallóglaigh, see Gallogly and Golightly .

variants.name: Engles
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Michel, Remi.
English and Scottish: variant of   English   or   Inglis  .
Altered form of German and Dutch   Engels  .

variants.name: Inglis
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire and Midlothian): ethnic name from Scots Inglis ‘English(man)’. Compare English .

variants.name: England
meanings: English: habitational name from Middle English Engelond ‘England’. It was probably a formal alternative to English , which is also well evidenced as a surname in England. These names may have been acquired by English landowners who moved in Norman social circles or who lived in a neighbouring country (Scotland, Wales, or Ireland), or by English merchants who traded abroad.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of various farmsteads so named, from Old Norse eng ‘meadow’ + land ‘land’.
Swedish: ornamental name with the same meaning as 2.

nameMeanings.name: Dionysia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Denise ; see Dennis . This form was in use in northern England from the 14th to the 17th century; the short form Dye is the source of the surname Dyson.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Dionysia English was born in 1212, in Devon, England, her father, Sir Robert English, was 26 and her mother, Lady Agathe, was 22. She married Lord Henry I de Champernoun of Iflracombe before 1245, in Broadclyst, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in March 1284, in her hometown, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dionysia English est née en 1212, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert English, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Agathe, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Lord Henry I de Champernoun of Iflracombe avant 1245, à Broadclyst, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en mars 1284, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dionysia English 1212 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert English 26 und ihre Mutter Lady Agathe 22. Sie hat vor 1245 in Broadclyst, Devon, England Lord Henry I de Champernoun of Iflracombe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im März 1284 im Alter von 72 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dionysia English è nata il nel 1212 nel Devon, England, sua padre, Sir Robert English, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Lady Agathe, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Lord Henry I de Champernoun of Iflracombe prima del 1245, nel Broadclyst, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel marzo 1284, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Dionysia Englishが1212年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Englishは26歳，母Lady Agatheは22歳であった。1245年以前にイギリスデボンブロアドクリストでLord Henry I de Champernoun of Iflracombeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1284年3月に故郷で72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dionysia English(이)가 1212년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert English(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Agathe(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1245년 이전 영국 데폰 브로드클리스트에서 Lord Henry I de Champernoun of Iflracombe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1284년 3월 그녀의 고향에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dionysia English nasceu em 1212, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert English, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Agathe, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord Henry I de Champernoun of Iflracombe antes 1245, em Broadclyst, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em março de 1284, em sua cidade natal, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dionysia English родилась в 1212 г. в местности девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert English было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Agathe, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Henry I de Champernoun of Iflracombe перед 1245 г. в местности броадклист, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла марта 1284 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dionysia English nació en 1212, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert English, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lady Agathe, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Lord Henry I de Champernoun of Iflracombe antes de 1245, en Broadclyst, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en marzo de 1284, en su pueblo, a la edad de 72 años.
